name: Xactly Sales Performance Management REST API
what_it_does: Xactly sales performance management (SPM) REST API for enterprises to automate incentive compensation management, sales quota management, territory planning, and commission calculation — enabling AI agents to retrieve compensation plan data, access payee earnings calculations, manage quota assignments, and integrate compensation data with CRM and HCM platforms through Xactly's AI-powered sales performance management platform. Enables AI agents to manage compensation management for sales rep commission and incentive compensation calculation retrieval automation, handle payee management for sales representative payee profile and assignment automation, access plan management for compensation plan structure and component retrieval automation, retrieve earning management for compensation payout and earned amount query automation, manage quota management for sales quota assignment and attainment tracking automation, handle territory management for sales territory assignment and hierarchy management automation, access credit management for revenue credit and transaction split allocation automation, retrieve analytics for compensation cost, attainment trend, and performance analytics automation, manage dispute management for commission dispute and correction workflow automation, and integrate Xactly with Salesforce, Workday, SAP, and enterprise CRM/HCM for automated incentive compensation management.
use_cases: Retrieving real-time commission calculations for sales rep compensation transparency automation agents
Syncing quota assignments and attainment data between Salesforce and Xactly for revenue operations agents
Automating compensation dispute investigation and correction with transaction-level detail for compensation operations agents
Reporting on compensation plan cost and ROI for finance and sales leadership analytics agents
not_for: Sales CRM and pipeline management (Xactly is compensation and quota management; Salesforce and HubSpot serve CRM)
Full HR payroll processing (Xactly calculates incentive comp; Workday and ADP serve base salary payroll processing)
Sales forecasting and revenue intelligence (Xactly is comp management; Clari and Gong serve sales forecasting and intelligence)
best_when: A revenue operations or finance team wanting AI agents to automate incentive compensation calculation retrieval, quota management, territory assignment, and compensation data integration between CRM and HCM platforms through Xactly's SPM platform.
avoid_when: XACTLY ENTERPRISE LICENSE IS REQUIRED: Xactly serves enterprises; automated open-developer assumption creates license_required for organizations without Xactly enterprise agreement; automated must have Xactly SPM subscription. COMPENSATION DATA IS SENSITIVE: Sales commission data includes individual compensation amounts; automated unrestricted-access assumption creates data_exposure_risk for API integrations without row-level security limiting access to authorized compensation data; automated must implement role-based access controls for compensation data retrieval. CRM DATA FEED IS PREREQUISITE: Xactly compensation calculations depend on CRM transaction data; automated standalone assumption creates calculation_lag for compensation results not reflecting latest CRM opportunity data; automated must ensure CRM-to-Xactly data sync is current before querying compensation calculations. CALCULATION RUNS ARE PERIODIC: Xactly compensation calculations run on scheduled basis (daily, monthly); automated real-time assumption creates stale_calculation for compensation queries between calculation runs; automated must understand calculation run schedule and query timing accordingly.

auth.notes: Xactly uses OAuth2 for Sales Performance Management REST API. REST API with JSON. San Jose, CA HQ. Founded 2005 by Christopher Cabrera. Private equity: Vista Equity Partners (acquired 2017). Products: Xactly Incent (incentive compensation), Xactly Align (quota management), Xactly Plan (territory and quota planning), Xactly Benchmarking. 1,600+ enterprise customers. Industries: technology, financial services, manufacturing, life sciences. Competes with SAP Commissions, Salesforce Spiff, and CaptivateIQ for sales compensation management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; enterprise subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per payee; Incent, Align, and Plan modules; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: San Jose CA. Vista Equity Partners PE. 1,600+ customers. Per-payee annual subscription. Sales comp industry leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth2 token; compensation calculation APIs throttled per subscription

known_agent_gotchas: CALCULATION PERIOD IS REQUIRED: Xactly compensation queries require specifying calculation period (month, quarter); automated current-period assumption creates empty_results for queries not specifying correct period parameter; automated must specify target calculation period for all compensation data queries

PAYEE IDs ARE XACTLY-INTERNAL: Xactly assigns internal payee IDs separate from HR system employee IDs; automated HR-ID assumption creates payee_not_found for compensation queries using HRMS employee ID without mapping to Xactly payee ID; automated must maintain ID mapping between HR system and Xactly payee IDs

COMPENSATION DATA HAS PII SENSITIVITY: Commission amounts and compensation plans are sensitive PII; automated public-data assumption creates unauthorized_data_access for compensation data exposed without proper data classification and access controls; automated must implement strict data access controls for compensation data

PLAN CHANGES AFFECT HISTORICAL CALCULATIONS: Compensation plan changes may retroactively affect historical calculations in some configurations; automated immutable-history assumption creates calculation_discrepancy for historical period queries after plan amendments; automated must version control plan changes and understand retroactivity settings

BATCH EXPORT IS PREFERRED FOR LARGE DATASETS: Xactly provides batch export for large compensation datasets; automated paginated-REST assumption creates timeout_error for large compensation history queries using standard REST pagination; automated must use Xactly batch export API for large-scale data extraction
agent_readiness.security_notes: Sales compensation/SPM. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Individual compensation, quota, and commission data (PII).

security_score_components.security_notes: SPM/compensation. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Individual sales compensation and incentive data (PII).
